---
author: "Jacopo Olivieri"
date: 2025-03-04
editor: source
format: html
number-sections: true
number-depth: 4
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  freeze: auto
  fig-width: 9
  fig-asp: 0.618 
  fig-align: center
---

# Hedonics Regressions {#sec-06-hedonics-regs}

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Initialize packages with version control
if (!requireNamespace("renv", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("renv")
}

# Load required packages
required_packages <- c(
  "rmarkdown", "rio", "tidyverse", "purrr", "here",
  "janitor", "viridis", "data.table", "arrow", "fixest"
)
install_if_missing <- function(packages) {
  new_packages <- packages[!sapply(packages, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
  if (length(new_packages) > 0) {
    install.packages(new_packages)
  }
  invisible(sapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE))
}
install_if_missing(required_packages)


# Initialize logging
log_path <- here::here("output", "log", "house_data_exploration")
if (!dir.exists(dirname(log_path))) {
  dir.create(dirname(log_path), recursive = TRUE)
}
logger::log_appender(logger::appender_file(log_path))
logger::log_layout(logger::layout_glue_colors)

# Ggplot theme
theme_pref <- theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 12),
    plot.title = element_text(
      face = "bold", size = 12,
      margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 10, unit = "pt")
    ),
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    axis.text = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 8),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray95"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray95"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(t = 10, r = 10, b = 10, l = 10, unit = "pt")
  )
```

```{r}
# Load data
## Data paths
path_house <- here::here("data", "processed", "panel_house")
path_spill <- here::here("data", "processed", "agg_spill_stats")
path_house_controls <- here::here("data", "processed", "house_price.parquet")

# House panel data
house_qtr <- open_dataset(path_house) %>%
  filter(period_type == "quarterly") %>%
  select(-contains("month")) %>%
  filter(radius == 500) %>%
  collect()
spill_qtr <- open_dataset(path_spill) %>%
  filter(period_type == "quarterly") %>%
  collect() %>%
  select(-contains("month"), -contains("_mo"))
# House controls
house_controls <- open_dataset(path_house_controls) %>%
  collect() %>%
  select(
    -transaction_id,
    -price, -date_of_transfer, -postcode, -saon, -locality, -year,
    -easting, -northing, -longitude, -latitude
  )

# Panel data
panel_house <- left_join(
  house_qtr, spill_qtr,
  by = join_by(site_id, qtr_id, quarter, year, period_type)) %>%
  left_join(house_controls, by = join_by(house_id)) %>%
  mutate(
    property_type = factor(property_type, levels = c("D", "S", "T", "F", "O")),
    old_new = factor(old_new, levels = c("N", "Y")),
    duration = factor(duration, levels = c("F", "L")),
    inv_distance = 1/distance_m)

panel_house_p <- panel(
  data = panel_house,
  panel.id = ~ site_id + qtr_id, 
  duplicate.method = "first"  
)
``` 


```{r}
# Option 1: No lags
model1 <- panel_house_p %>% 
  feols(log_price ~ log_spill_count, data = .)
summary(model1)
coefplot(model1, keep = "log_spill_count", main = "Effect of Spills by Months Prior to Sale")

# Option 2: 8 lags
model2 <- feols(
  log_price ~ l(log_spill_count, 0:6), 
  data = panel_house_p)
summary(model2)
coefplot(model2, keep = "log_spill_count", main = "Effect of Spills by Months Prior to Sale")

# Option 3: Current effect with inverse distance interaction (lag = 0)
model3 <- feols(
  log_price ~ l(log_spill_count, 0:6)*inv_distance,
  data = panel_house_p
)
summary(model3)
coefplot(model3, keep = "log_spill_count", main = "Effect of Spills by Months Prior to Sale")
```

```{r}
# Option 1: No lags
model11 <- panel_house_p %>% 
  feols(log_price ~ log_spill_count | site_id + qtr_id, 
        data = .)
summary(model11)
coefplot(model11, keep = "log_spill_count", main = "Effect of Spills by Months Prior to Sale")

# Option 2: 8 lags
model22 <- feols(
  log_price ~ l(log_spill_count, 0:6) | site_id + qtr_id, 
  data = panel_house_p)
summary(model22)
coefplot(model22, keep = "log_spill_count", main = "Effect of Spills by Months Prior to Sale")

# Option 3: Current effect with inverse distance interaction (lag = 0)
model33 <- feols(
  log_price ~ l(log_spill_count, 0:6)*inv_distance | site_id + qtr_id,  
  data = panel_house_p
)
summary(model33)
coefplot(model33, keep = "log_spill_count", main = "Effect of Spills by Months Prior to Sale")
```

```{r}
# Option 1: No lags
model111 <- panel_house_p %>% 
  feols(log_price ~ log_spill_count 
        + property_type + old_new + duration
        | qtr_id, 
        data = .)
summary(model111)
coefplot(model111, keep = "log_spill_count", main = "Effect of Spills by Months Prior to Sale")

# Option 2: 8 lags
model222 <- feols(
  log_price ~ log_spill_count
  + property_type + old_new + duration 
  | site_id + qtr_id, 
  data = panel_house_p)
summary(model222)
coefplot(model222, keep = "log_spill_count", main = "Effect of Spills by Months Prior to Sale")

# Option 3: Current effect with inverse distance interaction (lag = 0)
model333 <- feols(
  log_price ~ l(log_spill_count, 0:6)*inv_distance 
  + property_type + old_new + duration
  | site_id + qtr_id,  
  data = panel_house_p
)
summary(model333)
coefplot(model333, keep = "log_spill_count", main = "Effect of Spills by Months Prior to Sale")
```
